allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetNeighbor -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object IPAddress -like '192.168.11.*' | Select-Object IPAddress, LinkLayerAddress, State | Format-Table")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Start-Job { 1..254 | ForEach-Object { Test-Connection -ComputerName \('\\''192.168.11.'\\'' + $_\) -Count 1 -Quiet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } | Wait-Job -Timeout 45 | Remove-Job -Force')
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-Connection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Count 3 | Format-Table Source, Destination, Latency, Status")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Port 22 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ComputerName, RemoteAddress, RemotePort, TcpTestSucceeded | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Port 5900 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ComputerName, RemoteAddress, RemotePort, TcpTestSucceeded | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WindowsCapability -Online -Name OpenSSH* | Select-Object Name, State | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-Path 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\OpenSSH\\ssh.exe'; Get-Command ssh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null mac@192.168.11.11 "echo OK")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_mac -o IdentitiesOnly=yes -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 mac@192.168.11.11 "echo CONNECTED; whoami; hostname; uname -a")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_mac -o IdentitiesOnly=yes mac@192.168.11.11 "sudo -n true 2>&1 && echo SUDO_NOPASSWD_OK || echo SUDO_NEEDS_PASSWORD")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_mac -o IdentitiesOnly=yes mac@192.168.11.11 "chmod +x /tmp/fix_vnc_black.sh && ls -la /tmp/fix_vnc_black.sh && echo SCRIPT_STAGED")
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-Connection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Count 3 -ErrorAction Continue 2>&1 | Format-Table Source, Destination, Latency, Status -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Port 22 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ComputerName, RemoteAddress, PingSucceeded, TcpTestSucceeded | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 192.168.11.11 -Port 22 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object PingSucceeded, TcpTestSucceeded | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Resolve-DnsName -Name 'macnoMac-mini.local' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Type, IPAddress -AutoSize")
